arts.ttl: Leicester City vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Leicester entertain Chelsea on Saturday lunchtime with Blues boss Enzo Maresca making his return to the King Power Stadium for the first time. The Italian guided the Foxes back to the Premier League last campaign as they won the Championship in his only season in charge. arts.ttl: Chelsea eye Cole Palmer repeat as Gyokeres and Osimhen forgotten
arts.sum: Chelsea want to profit from the Manchester City academy once again as they eye a repeat of the success that Cole Palmer has had since moving from the Etihad Stadium little over a year ago. If Chelsea really are set on strengthening their squad in January, then Delap offers a tempting alternative to the strikers they have otherwise been linked with.
